name: Swiss Fondue#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss together cheese and flour.
2. Rub inside of saucepan with garlic. Discard garlic.
3. Add Sauterne and heat until bubbles rise.
4. Over low heat, add the cheese 1/2 cup at a time, stirring until melted after each addition.
5. Stir in salt, Worcestershire sauce, and nutmeg.
6. Transfer to fondue pot and serve with cubes of French bread.
